ew_context: Falling wedge completion suggests end of corrective decline - potential wave 4 termination leading into impulsive wave 5 advance
pattern_desc: Well-defined falling wedge pattern with converging trendlines and diminishing volume. Upper boundary breakout signals bullish reversal from oversold territory.
key_levels: Support: 51.09 (wedge low and stop). Resistance: 53.05 (pattern target and prior swing high)
invalidation: Close below 51.08 on H4 timeframe breaks the wedge support and negates the bullish reversal pattern
market_context: Crypto markets showing selective strength despite Bitcoin consolidation, with LTC positioned for mean reversion from oversold conditions
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Falling wedge pattern has formed with clear converging trendlines between resistance at 53.05 and support around 51.26. The current entry at 51.66 represents an optimal position near the apex of the wedge structure. EMA configuration (EMA20: 51.58 < EMA50: 51.67) shows bearish short-term momentum, but the wedge pattern suggests this is ending.

RSI at 40.9% indicates oversold conditions ripe for reversal, while ATR of 0.22 shows contained volatility within the pattern. The laminar flow with momentum alignment supports the bullish breakout thesis from this compression zone.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 53.05 (pattern target and prior swing high structure)
- **Support**: 51.26 (wedge support), 51.09 (stop loss and pattern invalidation level)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 51.08 on H4 timeframe would break the rising support trendline of the wedge and negate the bullish reversal setup.

## Macro & Flow Context

Despite broader crypto market consolidation with Bitcoin showing limited momentum, LTC's technical setup suggests independent strength. CFD momentum alignment with laminar flow conditions supports the wedge breakout scenario.
